summary: Good show with Jerry on fire; recording quality not discussed but likely adequate
review: Both reviewers enjoyed the performance, highlighting Jerry Garcia’s soaring scale work and noting a curious lyric mix‑up during Brown Eyed Women. No specific comments about the tape’s source or fidelity were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews praise the musical performance (especially Jerry) and raise no serious complaints about sound, suggesting a solid show with an acceptable recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned sound issues; assume decent but unverified quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not comment on set structure, focusing only on overall performance and a lyric moment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia was "working the scales" and at the top of his game.
